## Properties

| Property   | Attribute  | Description                                     | Type                                     | Default |
| ---------- | ---------- | ----------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------- | ------- |
| `content`  | `content`  | Text content displayed in the tooltip           | `string`                                 | `''`    |
| `delay`    | `delay`    | Delay in ms before showing the tooltip          | `number`                                 | `200`   |
| `position` | `position` | Position of the tooltip relative to the trigger | `"bottom" \| "left" \| "right" \| "top"` | `'top'` |
